description_long: This is a compact, retro-style portable radio receiver with a rectangular body featuring a combination of orange and blue panels. The front face displays a large circular black speaker grille on the right, a rectangular blue display or tuning window on the left, and two prominent silver dials or knobs on the top. A sturdy, wide handle arches over the top, allowing for easy carrying. The back panel is mostly blue with multiple ventilation slits and a small access panel, suggesting battery or component access. The sides reveal the thickness of the device and the protruding knobs, while the overall design is robust and functional, suitable for outdoor or urban use.
description: A retro portable radio receiver with orange and blue panels, a large black speaker grille, silver dials, and a sturdy carrying handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, blue display window, and two silver dials on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the radio and the protruding black knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue back panel with ventilation slits and a small access panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the handle attachment and the layered construction of the radio.
